name: Frango Mints
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt and cool the chocolate.
2. Cream together the margarine, powdered sugar, eggs, and vanilla.
3. Add the cooled chocolate and a few drops of mint extract to the creamed mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
5. Allow it to cool and set completely.
6. Cut into squares.
